description: First class; great design ideas, responsive and we ran nicely ahead of our launch date!
author: Alex M.
pros: Really professional, accessible, a desire to listen to ideas and improve the design, while also engaging with our commercial goals, strategy and approach. Great value for money.
cons: Genuinely struggling to suggest cons. When using an excellent service such as Super, one just needs to be clear on not wanting to build/host direct, so that it works nicely for both parties from the outset.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very very impressed with the team's responsiveness and the professional end product. Surely the future of website building.
author: william J.
pros: In terms of getting website together that looks and feels high end, but absorbs hardly any of my or my teams bandwidth to get up and running and maintain, this was the best experience I've had yet, and ive worked on a lot of website projects over the years
cons: No quibbles at this point - and looking forward to some of the new design and branding features.

description: Super feels like a revolution. We no longer have to try and schedule work with an agency – any updates just get done, plus we’re paying a fraction of the price each month!
author: Thomas S.
pros: Support is second-to-none. Everything is done by their team of experts who have worked in our industry for 20+ years. The pricing is also amazing. We’re paying a fraction of what we used to pay with our agency, and getting a much better overall service.
cons: Can’t think of anything. All aspects are postive

author: Mike E.
cons: SEO needed fine tuning before it worked well
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Expellant wouldn't hesitate to recommend Rob and his team to close friends or family !
author: Gareth D.
pros: Very knowledgeable on all aspects of IT . Nothing is a problem to them no matter what your IT need ,they are approachable ,fast and proactive!
cons: There is nothing to not like as more than happy end to end

author: Paul O.
pros: whenever we need additional IT support [sensitive content hidden] is on hand to advise, assist and implement.
cons: I can't say I have any negative comments

review_title: Fantastic Service, Great Price - As a business owner you'd be mad not to consider this
description: Very impressive. Great team to deal with and the results speak for themselves.
author: Anthony B.
pros: Initially the branding and web design had the biggest impact on is. since then however, the ability to make changes and update ad-hoc is ideal. all within the low monthly subscription.
cons: Nothing- we've had no bad experience. Everything interaction has been positive.

author: Rebecca B.
pros: Extremely responsive, ( within moments ) and always willing to work with you as you get set up.
cons: Nothing - everything has worked smoothly since setup was completed!

description: Very satisfied and would highly recommend their services and products.
author: Daniel P.
pros: Makes creating a modern website and regular updates very simple and cost effective.
cons: Cannot say at this moment in time, there have been no negatives so far.

author: Phil T.
pros: quick response times and always find a solution
cons: no cons, I don't have anything negative to say about super

author: Laura C.
pros: fast efficient service value for money and quick responses

review_title: Super by name & super by nature
author: Cy V.
pros: It's just an easy, simple service that allows me to contact one person directly and deal with the same person when ever we have an issue.
cons: I can't think of anything at this moment in time.

author: Daniel R.
pros: The ability to make any and all updates to our website at short notice.
cons: No, we dont have any negatives just yet. The system works well for what we need from it.
